message:
[Recovery] stage=start retry=0 payload={'error_type': 'unknown_error', 'user_message': "💰 API Quota Exceeded

You've reached your API quota limit for this AI model.

**Your quota resets in:** 1 minute

**What you can do:**
• Wait 1 minute for the quota to reset
• Use a different AI model (if available)
• Upgrade your API plan for higher limits
• Check your API provider's usage dashboard

**Note:** This is an API provider limit, not a Forge limit."}
